title: unable to copy image to docker daemon
body:
Our automated tests running against the [FAHC](https://pagure.io/fedora-atomic-host-continuous) stream found the following problem while trying to use `atomic pull busybox`:

```
# rpm -q skopeo skopeo-containers
skopeo-0.1.24.15-62c68998d7107bac9075a940866ac8afa586ee49.91aca802423203f20b5cf4eeddbdcad58d9d70ed.fc26.x86_64
skopeo-containers-0.1.24.15-62c68998d7107bac9075a940866ac8afa586ee49.91aca802423203f20b5cf4eeddbdcad58d9d70ed.fc26.x86_64

# atomic --debug pull busybox                                                                                                                                                          
Namespace(_class=<class 'Atomic.pull.Pull'>, assumeyes=False, debug=True, func='pull_image', ignore=False, image='busybox', profile=False, reg_type=None, src_creds=None, storage=None)                            Pulling docker.io/library/busybox:latest ...          
Executing: /usr/bin/skopeo --policy=/etc/containers/policy.json --debug copy --remove-signatures docker://docker.io/library/busybox:latest docker-daemon:docker.io/library/busybox:latest
DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration
DEBU[0000]  Using "default-docker" configuration    
DEBU[0000]  No signature storage configuration found for docker.io/library/busybox:latest
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io                
DEBU[0000] IsRunningImageAllowed for image docker:docker.io/library/busybox:latest                       
DEBU[0000]  Using default policy section                                                                 
DEBU[0000]  Requirement 0: allowed                  
DEBU[0000] Overall: allowed                         
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/     
DEBU[0000] docker-daemon: sending done, status Error saving image to docker engine: error during connect: Post https://%2Fvar%2Frun%2Fdocker.sock/v1.22/images/load?quiet=1: dial tcp: lookup /var/run/docker.sock:
 no such host                                                                                                                                                                                                      
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ err <nil>                                              
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ status 401                                                                                                                                                        
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/busybox/manifests/latest                                                                                                                                    
DEBU[0000] Downloading /v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:6ad733544a6317992a6fac4eb19fe1df577d4dec7529efec28a5bd0edad0fd30                                                                                           
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:6ad733544a6317992a6fac4eb19fe1df577d4dec7529efec28a5bd0edad0fd30                                             
DEBU[0000] Manifest has MIME type application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, ordered candidate list [application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json]                    
DEBU[0000] ... will first try using the original manifest unmodified                                                                                                                                           
Copying blob sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5                                                                                                                           
DEBU[0000] Downloading /v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5                                                                                           
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5                                                                       
DEBU[0000] Detected compression format gzip         
 0 B / 698.53 KB [-------------------------------------------------------------]DEBU[0000] Using original blob without modification
DEBU[0000] Sending as tar file sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5   
 0 B / 698.53 KB [----------------------------------------------------------] 0s                         
DEBU[0000] docker-daemon: Closing tar stream to abort loading                                                                                                                                                      
FATA[0000] Error writing blob: Error saving image to docker engine: error during connect: Post https://%2Fvar%2Frun%2Fdocker.sock/v1.22/images/load?quiet=1: dial tcp: lookup /var/run/docker.sock: no such host   
                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
Traceback (most recent call last):                                                                       
  File "/usr/bin/atomic", line 185, in <module>                                                          
    sys.exit(_func())                                                                                                                                                                                              
  File "/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/Atomic/pull.py", line 62, in pull_image                                                                                                                                   
    be.pull_image(self.args.image, remote_image_obj, debug=self.args.debug, assumeyes=self.args.assumeyes, src_creds=src_creds)
  File "/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/Atomic/backends/_docker.py", line 347, in pull_image                                                                                                                      
    policy_filename=trust.policy_filename, src_creds=src_creds)                                          
  File "/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/Atomic/util.py", line 437, in skopeo_copy                       
    return check_call(cmd, env=os.environ)                                                               
  File "/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/Atomic/util.py", line 199, in check_call
    return subprocess.check_call(cmd, env=env, stdin=stdin, stderr=stderr, stdout=stdout, close_fds=True)                                                                                                          
  File "/usr/lib64/python3.6/subprocess.py", line 291, in check_call                                     
    raise CalledProcessError(retcode, cmd)                                                               
subprocess.CalledProcessError: Command '['/usr/bin/skopeo', '--policy=/etc/containers/policy.json', '--debug', 'copy', '--remove-signatures', 'docker://docker.io/library/busybox:latest', 'docker-daemon:docker.io
/library/busybox:latest']' returned non-zero exit status 1.          
                                                                      
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
                                                                           
Traceback (most recent call last):                    
  File "/usr/bin/atomic", line 201, in <module>                      
    sys.exit(e.returncode)
SystemExit: 1
```

In this situation, `skopeo` was built from commit 62c68998d7107bac9075a940866ac8afa586ee49.

If I rollback the host to the previous release, I get a version of `skopeo` build from bd07ffb9f430d232115311442fd06e605a075289 and everything works fine:

```
# rpm -q skopeo skopeo-containers
skopeo-0.1.24.13-bd07ffb9f430d232115311442fd06e605a075289.91aca802423203f20b5cf4eeddbdcad58d9d70ed.fc26.x86_64
skopeo-containers-0.1.24.13-bd07ffb9f430d232115311442fd06e605a075289.91aca802423203f20b5cf4eeddbdcad58d9d70ed.fc26.x86_64

# atomic --debug pull busybox                                                
Namespace(_class=<class 'Atomic.pull.Pull'>, assumeyes=False, debug=True, func='pull_image', ignore=False, image='busybox', profile=False, reg_type=None, src_creds=None, storage=None)                            
Pulling docker.io/library/busybox:latest ...        
Executing: /usr/bin/skopeo --policy=/etc/containers/policy.json --debug copy --remove-signatures docker://docker.io/library/busybox:latest docker-daemon:docker.io/library/busybox:latest                          
DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration          
DEBU[0000]  Using "default-docker" configuration                                                         
DEBU[0000]  No signature storage configuration found for docker.io/library/busybox:latest                
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io                
DEBU[0000] IsRunningImageAllowed for image docker:docker.io/library/busybox:latest                       
DEBU[0000]  Using default policy section                                                                 
DEBU[0000]  Requirement 0: allowed                                                                       
DEBU[0000] Overall: allowed                                                                              
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/                                                          
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ err <nil>                                               
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ status 401                                              
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/busybox/manifests/latest                          
DEBU[0000] Downloading /v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:6ad733544a6317992a6fac4eb19fe1df577d4dec7529efec28a5bd0edad0fd30                                                                                           
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:6ad733544a6317992a6fac4eb19fe1df577d4dec7529efec28a5bd0edad0fd30                                                                       
DEBU[0000] Manifest has MIME type application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, ordered candidate list [application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json]                                              
DEBU[0000] ... will first try using the original manifest unmodified                                     
Copying blob sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5                     
DEBU[0000] Downloading /v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5                                                                                           
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5                                                                       
DEBU[0000] Detected compression format gzip                                                              
 0 B / 698.53 KB [-------------------------------------------------------------]DEBU[0000] Using original blob without modification                                                                                
DEBU[0000] Sending as tar file sha256:0ffadd58f2a61468f527cc4f0fc45272ee4a1a428abe014546c89de2aa6a0eb5   
 698.53 KB / 698.53 KB [====================================================] 0s                         
Copying config sha256:6ad733544a6317992a6fac4eb19fe1df577d4dec7529efec28a5bd0edad0fd30                   
DEBU[0000] No compression detected                                                                       
 0 B / 1.46 KB [---------------------------------------------------------------]DEBU[0000] Using original blob without modification                                                                                
DEBU[0000] Sending as tar file sha256:6ad733544a6317992a6fac4eb19fe1df577d4dec7529efec28a5bd0edad0fd30   
 1.46 KB / 1.46 KB [========================================================] 0s                         
Writing manifest to image destination               
DEBU[0000] Sending as tar file manifest.json                                                             
Storing signatures                                  
DEBU[0000] docker-daemon: Closing tar stream                                                             
DEBU[0000] docker-daemon: Waiting for status                                                             
DEBU[0000] docker-daemon: sending done, status <nil>                                                     
```

comments.body:
Thanks for catching this!

@hferentschik This seems to be related to #327.
